items.title: docx

items.description: Extract text, tables, metadata, merge & annotate PDFs.

items.description: Read, generate, and adjust slides, layouts, templates.

items.title: xlsx
items.description: Spreadsheet manipulation: formulas, charts, data transformations.

items.title: Markdown to EPUB Converter
items.description: Converts markdown documents and chat summaries into professional EPUB ebook files.

items.title: artifacts-builder
items.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui).

items.title: aws-skills
items.description: AWS development with CDK best practices, cost optimization MCP servers, and serverless/event-driven architecture patterns.

items.title: Changelog Generator
items.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by analyzing history and transforming technical commits into customer-friendly release notes.

items.title: Claude Code Terminal Title
items.description: Gives each Claud-Code terminal window a dynamic title that describes the work being done so you don't lose track of what window is doing what.

items.title: D3.js Visualization
items.description: Teaches Claude to produce D3 charts and interactive data visualizations.

items.title: FFUF Web Fuzzing
items.description: Integrates the ffuf web fuzzer so Claude can run fuzzing tasks and analyze results for vulnerabilities.

items.title: finishing-a-development-branch
items.description: Guides completion of development work by presenting clear options and handling chosen workflow.

items.title: iOS Simulator

items.title: jules
items.description: Delegate coding tasks to Google Jules AI agent for async bug fixes, documentation, tests, and feature implementation on GitHub repos.

items.title: LangSmith Fetch
items.description: Debug LangChain and LangGraph agents by automatically fetching and analyzing execution traces from LangSmith Studio. First AI observability skill for Claude Code.

items.title: MCP Builder
items.description: Guides creation of high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for integrating external APIs and services with LLMs using Python or TypeScript.

items.title: move-code-quality-skill
items.description: Analyzes Move language packages against the official Move Book Code Quality Checklist for Move 2024 Edition compliance and best practices.

items.title: Playwright Browser Automation
items.description: Model-invoked Playwright automation for testing and validating web applications.

items.title: prompt-engineering
items.description: Teaches well-known prompt engineering techniques and patterns, including Anthropic best practices and agent persuasion principles.

items.title: pypict-claude-skill
items.description: Design comprehensive test cases using PICT (Pairwise Independent Combinatorial Testing) for requirements or code, generating optimized test suites with pairwise coverage.

items.title: reddit-fetch
items.description: Fetches Reddit content via Gemini CLI when WebFetch is blocked or returns 403 errors.

items.title: Skill Creator
items.description: Provides guidance for creating effective Claude Skills that extend capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, and tool integrations.

items.title: Skill Seekers
items.description: Automatically converts any documentation website into a Claude AI skill in minutes.

items.title: software-architecture
items.description: Implements design patterns including Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and comprehensive software design best practices.

items.title: subagent-driven-development
items.description: Dispatches independent subagents for individual tasks with code review checkpoints between iterations for rapid, controlled development.

items.title: test-driven-development
items.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code.

items.title: using-git-worktrees
items.description: Creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification.

items.title: postgres
items.description: Execute safe read-only SQL queries against PostgreSQL databases with multi-connection support and defense-in-depth security.

items.title: root-cause-tracing
items.description: Use when errors occur deep in execution and you need to trace back to find the original trigger.

items.description: Helps write internal communications including 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, status reports, and project updates using company-specific formats.

items.description: Identifies and qualifies high-quality leads by analyzing your product, searching for target companies, and providing actionable outreach strategies.

items.description: Extract full article text and metadata from web pages.

items.title: brainstorming
items.description: Transform rough ideas into fully-formed designs through structured questioning and alternative exploration.

items.description: Assists in writing high-quality content by conducting research, adding citations, improving hooks, and providing section-by-section feedback.

items.description: Provides assistance with planning family history and genealogy research projects.
